data.title: TXNM Energy Q4 Ongoing Earnings Rise
data.description:
TXNM Energy reported Q4 ongoing earnings Friday of $0.30 per diluted share, up from $0.18 a year earlier.

Analysts polled by FactSet expected $0.30.

TXNM Energy shares were down nearly 4% in recent premarket activity.

data.title: EU Clears Germany's EUR41 Million State Aid for Uniper's Electrolyzer Project
data.description:
The European Commission approved Germany's 41 million-euro direct grant to support Uniper's Chess project in the Lower Saxony state.

The energy group's project involves the development and operation of a 30-megawatt electrolyzer, which is anticipated to produce 2,700 tonnes of renewable hydrogen per annum, according to a Friday release.

Completion of the project is expected in 2027.

data.title: Teva Pharmaceutical US Affiliate, Alvotech Selarsdi Injection Now Available in US
data.description:
Teva Pharmaceutical Industries US affiliate and Alvotech said Friday that the Selarsdi injection is now available in the US to treat psoriatic arthritis, plaque psoriasis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pediatric plaque psoriasis and pediatric psoriatic arthritis.

Selarsdi is biosimilar to Stelara and it is the second biosimilar now available in the country under the Teva and Alvotech collaboration, they added.

The US Food and Drug Administration provisionally determined that Selarsdi is interchangeable with the reference biologic Stelara after the first interchangeable biosimilar expires, on April 30, the parties said.

Teva Pharmaceutical's stock rose 2.7%, while Alvotech's shares were up 3% in recent Friday premarket activity.

data.title: German Small, Midcaps Would Benefit From Stable two-Party Alliance — Market Talk
data.description: German elections are fueling hopes for a fresh start in economic policy. Mid- and small-cap stocks would especially benefit if elections resulted in a stable two-party alliance, DZ Bank analyst Soren Hettler says in a note. A government able to act decisively could boost the domestic economy, which is key for Germany's second-tier companies. MDAX midcap companies generate around 25% of their turnover in Germany and SDAX small-cap companies almost 40%, Hettler says. The MDAX and SDAX have risen about 8% and 9% respectively since the start of the year, while the DAX blue chip index is up about 13%. (sarah.sloat@wsj.com)

data.title: Emera Profit Halved on One-Off Market-Value Losses, Asset Write-Downs
data.description:
By Adriano Marchese

Emera reported a decline in profit in the fourth quarter due to market value changes to its investments and write-downs on certain assets.

The Halifax, Nova Scotia-based utilities company on Friday posted a lower net income of 154 million Canadian dollars ($108.6 million), or C$0.52 a share, down from C$289 million, or C$1.04 a share, in the comparable quarter a year earlier.

In the quarter, the company's profit took a hit of C$260 million from changes in the market value of some of its investments, known as mark-to-market, as well charges of C$26 million to close down certain operations and write down assets.

On an adjusted basis, which excludes one-off costs and exceptional items such as impairment losses, earnings came to C$0.84 a share. According to FactSet, analysts were expecting C$0.76 a share.

Regarding the company outlook, Emera said it maintains its targeted 5%-to-7% average adjusted EPS growth through 2027 and still expects to deliver on its C$20 billion five-year capital plan to drive a 7%-to-8% rate base growth.

Write to Adriano Marchese at adriano.marchese@wsj.com

data.title: GUIDANCE: (ATMU) Atmus Filtration Technologies Expects Full Year 2025 Adjusted EPS Range $2.35 - $2.60, vs. FactSet Est of $2.56
Crypto Price Analysis February-21: ETH, XRP, ADA, BNB, and SOL
data.description:
This week, we examine Ethereum, Ripple, Cardano, Binance Coin, and Solana in greater detail.

Ethereum (ETH)

Ethereum continues to consolidate and closed the week with a 2% price increase. This brings it just under the $2,870 resistance which has not been seriously challenged yet, but could soon be put under pressure.

Momentum is slowly building up for ETH which is flashing a clear bullish trend both on the daily MACD and RSI. The only missing ingredient is volume which continues to lag behind and is rather low since early February.

Looking ahead, Ethereum may attempt a breakout above $2,870, which could allow it to quickly reach $3,000 next. This would increase market optimism and bring buyers back to start a new rally.Ripple (XRP)

XRP had a good week after increasing by 5%. However, this was not enough to see the price test the resistance at $3, which continues to hold back any attempts by buyers to take this cryptocurrency higher.

While this recent advance is a positive sign for bulls, the momentum and volume still lack sufficient strength to generate a breakthrough at this time. For this reason, the price may continue to consolidate here.

Looking ahead, XRP needs a clear break above $3 if it hopes to return on a sustained rally. Anything less may be interpreted as bearish since buyers may lose interest in the lack of volatility.Cardano (ADA)

ADA is found at the same price of $0.8 as last week, with no significant movement. The current resistance is between $0.84 and $0.9, and buyers seem unable to push the price above it.

Sellers always returned as soon as Cardano tried to approach the key resistance. This has forced the price to move sideways under this level, but this flat price action is unlikely to last.

Looking ahead, this cryptocurrency is at a critical level. To turn the chart bullish, buyers will have to push the price above $0.9 soon. Otherwise, sellers have a clear opening to take back control and take ADA back to $0.65, which acts as support.Binance Coin (BNB)

Binance Coin is found in a pullback after buyers tried to break the $700 resistance but failed. This is why the asset fell by 2% since last week. In part, this price action is normal after that sustained rally in early February.

However, buyers will have to gather their strength and make sure they defend the key support at $600 because losing that level would turn BNB bearish. So far, the price has managed to stay around $650, which is encouraging.

Looking ahead, once this pullback is over, BNB could attempt another attempt at the key resistance. For that to happen, this cryptocurrency has to maintain a price above $600.Solana (SOL)

Solana had a difficult week after its price made a lower low and fell by 11%. This goes against the current trend across the market, where most altcoins are flat or consolidating. The price also tested the key support at $164, which held well to date.

The biggest concern for SOL holders is the fact that the price made a lower low. This is a clear signal of weakness and could see the support at $164 be put under pressure again if buyers don’t return in numbers soon.

Looking ahead, Solana is found in a difficult spot with sellers having the upper hand right now. If nothing changes, we could see lower price levels in the future with $134 as the next major support level.

data.title: Block Stock Falls 7% After Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates
data.description:
Feb 21 - Block (XYZ, Financial) stock slid 7% in Thursday after-hours trading after its Q4 earnings fell below analyst estimates and its guidance for Q1 and full-year 2025 disappointed investors. The parent of the Square system for merchants and the Cash App reported Q4 gross profit of $2.31B, slightly below the $2.32B expected, while Q4 adjusted EPS reached $0.71, trailing the consensus estimate of $0.87. The company now projects Q1 gross profit at $2.32B and expects Q1 adjusted operating income of $430M, compared to $402M in Q4 2024. For full-year 2025, Block anticipates a gross profit of $10.22B, under the Visible Alpha consensus of $10.27B, yet higher than $8.89B in 2024. Block forecasts improvements in its Cash App and Square ecosystems later in the year.

CEO Jack Dorsey outlines a strategy to build a neighborhood network that connects sellers, buyers, staff, and artists. The company scales up its US account executive and field sales teams, expands international outreach, and invests in applied AI tools and robust marketing, aiming to refine growth targets and sustain long-term performance.

data.title: US Hospital Starts Clinical Evaluation of BiBBInstruments' Endoscopy Biopsy Instrument
data.description:
BiBBInstruments (BIBB.ST) said Friday that a Detroit hospital in Michigan, US, started the clinical evaluation of its EndoDrill GI biopsy instrument for endoscopy.

Henry Ford St. John Hospital & Medical Center used the Swedish cancer diagnostics company's device for tissue sampling in the liver and pancreas.

data.title: Federal Trade Commission Invites Public to Disclose Experiences With Tech Platforms
data.description:
The Federal Trade Commission said Thursday it launched an effort to solicit public commentary to better understand how technology platforms "deny or degrade" access to services based on speech or affiliations.

The agency, now controlled by the administration of President Donald Trump, alleged the platforms "employ opaque or unpredictable internal procedures to restrict users' access to services" in what it suggests may constitute "anti-competitive conduct" or "potentially unlawful conduct."

The agency said it "encourages members of the public" to comment on relevant matters that may have affected them or others by May 21.

data.title: Sinopec Engineering Logs 27.2 Billion Yuan Worth of New Contracts in Three Months to December
data.description:
Sinopec Engineering's (Group) new contracts for the three months ended Dec. 31, 2024, amounted to 27.2 billion yuan.

For the year 2024, the total value of the new contracts rose by 25.4% to 100.6 billion yuan from 80.3 billion yuan a year prior, a Friday bourse filing stated.

As of Dec. 31, 2024, the engineering and construction firm's backlog stood at 172.7 billion yuan, 26.7% higher than the 136.3 billion yuan recorded for 2023.

data.title: Social Buzz: Wallstreetbets Stocks Mostly Higher Premarket Friday.
data.description:
The most-talked-about stocks in the Reddit subforum Wallstreetbets were mostly higher hours before Friday's opening bell.

Celsius Holdings rose by 32% in premarket hours, reversing a 2.2% decline from the previous session. Celsius Holdings reported a beat on Q4 earnings and sales and announced the acquisition of Alani Nutrition.

Palantir Technologies advanced by 1.2% in pre-bell activity, swinging from a 5.2% fall at Thursday's close.

Super Micro Computer was up 1.2% premarket, reversing a 1.6% decline from the previous session.

Nebius Group was 1.2% higher pre-bell, after closing Thursday with a 3.2% increase.

Reddit advanced by 0.8% in premarket activity, swinging from a 7.5% decline at Thursday's close.

Walmart was up 0.3% hours before market open, following a 6.5% fall at Thursday's close.

Rivian Automotive declined by 3.7% pre-bell, after closing Thursday with a 2.3% fall.

Nvidia was down 0.4% premarket, swinging from a 0.6% increase at Thursday's close.

data.title: Gold Brief: Down 7.27 or 0.25% at US$2,931.77 From All Time Highs
Elections, Alibaba Lift European Bourses Midday
data.description:
European bourses tracked moderately higher midday Friday as traders braced for weekend national elections in Germany and digested a strong earnings report from internet-commerce giant Alibaba (BABA).

Food and tech stocks led broad gains while oil issues lagged.

Investors also eyed Wall Street futures mildly signaling green and a 4% rise overnight in Hong Kong's Hang Seng Index after Alibaba's quarterly results topped expectations, triggering a tech-sector rally.

In economic news, the flash Eurozone composite purchasing managers index (PMI) logged at 50.2 in February, unchanged from January and still marginally above the 50-marker that separates growth from contraction, reported S&P Global.

The pan-continental Stoxx Europe 600 Index was up 0.6% mid-session.

The Stoxx Europe 600 Technology Index was up 0.9%, and the Stoxx 600 Banks Index gained 0.6%.

The Stoxx Europe 600 Oil and Gas Index was off 0.4%, and the Stoxx 600 Europe Food and Beverage Index inclined 1.6%.

The REITE, a European REIT index, rose 0.7%, and the Stoxx Europe 600 Retail Index inclined 0.7%.

On the national market indexes, Germany's DAX was up 0.3%, and the FTSE 100 in London was up 0.2%. The CAC 40 in Paris was up 0.7%, and Spain's IBEX 35 gained 0.1%.

Yields on benchmark 10-year German bonds were lower, near 2.49%.

Front-month North Sea Brent crude oil futures were down 0.9% to $75.83 per barrel.

The Euro Stoxx 50 volatility index was down 1.4% to 17.28, indicating below-average volatility for European stock markets in the next 30 days, a positive signal. A reading above 20 indicates choppier markets ahead, while below 20 suggests calmer exchanges.

data.title: German Manufacturing PMI Improvement Could Be Calm Before Storm — Market Talk
data.description: The improving purchasing managers' index no longer indicates a collapse in manufacturing production, Deutsche Bank's chief economist for Germany, Robin Winkler, says in a note. The manufacturing PMI rose to a nine-month high of 47.3 in February, albeit still indicating contraction. However, the downside is that the data show industrial companies still expect a sharp decline in employment, consistent with continued reports of job cuts at various companies, he says. Moreover, although the order situation stabilized at the start of the year, it remains to be seen whether this is not just the calm before the storm, Winkler says. "Export-orientated companies are currently benefiting from a weak euro, anticipating a potential tariff conflict with the U.S.," he says. (edward.frankl@wsj.com)

data.title: Tesla Recalls Nearly 380,000 Vehicles Over Power Steering Issue
data.description:
Tesla will recall nearly 380,000 vehicles in the US due to a power steering assist failure that could make steering harder, especially at low speeds, National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said Friday.

The recall affects some 2023 Model 3 and Model Y vehicles running older software, which may experience an overvoltage issue that could damage motor drive components.

Tesla has issued an over-the-air software update to resolve the problem, the regulator said. Owners will be notified on March 25.
